title: Journal Voucher GET schema
description: A schema for getting a Journal Voucher.

collection.description: The array containing all entries belonging to the voucher on given journal.

voucherNumber.description: Journal voucher number that must be at least 1. Together with the accountingYear it is a unique identifier for the voucher.

accountingYear.description: The accounting year the voucher belongs to. Together with the voucherNumber it is a unique identifier for the voucher.

year.description: A unique identifier of the accounting year.

self.description: A unique reference to the accounting year resource.

journal.description: The journal the voucher belongs to.

journalNumber.description: Journal number that must be at least 1.

self.description: A unique reference to the journal resource.

entries.description: Entries, separated by type, for the journal.

journal.description: The journal the voucher belongs to.

journalNumber.description: Journal number that must be at least 1.

self.description: A unique reference to the journal resource.

contraAccount.description: The account used for the funds.

self.description: A unique reference to the account resource.

vatCode.description: The unique identifier of the contra vat account.

self.description: A unique link reference to the contraVatAccount item.

costType.description: The cost type for this entity.

costTypeNumber.description: The unique identifier of the cost type.

self.description: A unique link reference to the cost type.

code.description: The ISO 4217 3-letter currency code of the entry.

self.description: A unique link reference to the currency item.

date.description: Entry date. Format according to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

departmentalDistribution.description: A departmental distribution defines which departments this entry is distributed between. This requires the departments module to be enabled.

departmentalDistributionNumber.description: A unique identifier of the departmental distribution.

self.description: A unique reference to the departmental distribution resource.

employee.description: Employee that this entry is related to. Requires Project module

employeeNumber.description: A unique numerical identifier with a maximum of 9 digits.

self.description: A unique link reference to the employee item.

exchangeRate.description: The exchange rate between the base currency and the invoice currency.

entryType.description: Type of the journal entry. This is automatically set to financeVoucher.

voucher.description: Voucher that the entry belongs to.

voucherNumber.description: Journal voucher number that must be at least 1.

self.description: A unique link reference to the voucher item.

contraVatAmount.description: The amount of VAT on the entry on the contra account.

contraVatAmountInBaseCurrency.description: The amount of VAT on the entry on the contra account in base currency.

remainderInDefaultCurrency.description: Remaining amount to be paid in default currency.

account.description: The account used by the entry.

self.description: A unique reference to the account resource.

project.description: The project the entry is connected to.

projectNumber.description: A unique identifier of the project.

self.description: A unique reference to the project resource.

vatCode.description: The unique identifier of the vat account.

self.description: A unique link reference to the vatAccount item.

vatAmount.description: The amount of VAT on the entry. Used if the entry has a VAT account.

vatAmountBaseCurrency.description: The amount of VAT on the voucher in base currency.

unit1.description: The first unit of measure applied to the entry. Requires dimension module.

unitNumber.description: The unique identifier of the unit.

self.description: A unique reference to the unit resource.

unit2.description: The second unit of measure applied to the entry. Requires dimension module.

unitNumber.description: The unique identifier of the unit.

self.description: A unique reference to the unit resource.

journal.description: The journal the voucher belongs to.

journalNumber.description: Journal number that must be at least 1.

self.description: A unique reference to the journal resource.

contraAccount.description: The account used for the funds. Either 'customer' or 'contraAccount' is required.

self.description: A unique reference to the account resource.

vatCode.description: The unique identifier of the contra vat account.

self.description: A unique link reference to the contraVatAccount item.

code.description: The ISO 4217 3-letter currency code of the entry.

self.description: A unique link reference to the currency item.

date.description: Entry date. Format according to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

departmentalDistribution.description: A departmental distribution defines which departments this entry is distributed between. This requires the departments module to be enabled.

departmentalDistributionNumber.description: A unique identifier of the departmental distribution.

self.description: A unique reference to the departmental distribution resource.

employee.description: Employee that this entry is related to. Requires Project module

employeeNumber.description: A unique numerical identifier with a maximum of 9 digits.

self.description: A unique link reference to the employee item.

exchangeRate.description: The exchange rate between the base currency and the invoice currency.

entryType.description: Type of the journal entry. This is automatically set to customerPayment.

voucher.description: Voucher that the entry belongs to.

voucherNumber.description: Journal voucher number that must be at least 1.

self.description: A unique link reference to the voucher item.

contraVatAmount.description: The amount of VAT on the entry on the contra account.

contraVatAmountInBaseCurrency.description: The amount of VAT on the entry on the contra account in base currency.

remainderInDefaultCurrency.description: Remaining amount to be paid in default currency.

customer.description: The customer this entry is based on. Either 'customer' or 'contraAccount' is required.

customerNumber.description: The customer number is a positive unique numerical identifier with a maximum of 9 digits.

self.description: A unique reference to the customer resource.

journal.description: The journal the voucher belongs to.

journalNumber.description: Journal number that must be at least 1.

self.description: A unique reference to the journal resource.

contraAccount.description: The account used for the funds. Either 'supplier' or 'contraAccount' is required.

self.description: A unique reference to the account resource.

vatCode.description: The unique identifier of the contra vat account.

self.description: A unique link reference to the contraVatAccount item.

costType.description: The cost type for this entity.

costTypeNumber.description: The unique identifier of the cost type.

self.description: A unique link reference to the cost type.

code.description: The ISO 4217 3-letter currency code of the entry.

self.description: A unique link reference to the currency item.

date.description: Entry date. Format according to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

departmentalDistribution.description: A departmental distribution defines which departments this entry is distributed between. This requires the departments module to be enabled.

departmentalDistributionNumber.description: A unique identifier of the departmental distribution.

self.description: A unique reference to the departmental distribution resource.

employee.description: Employee that this entry is related to. Requires Project module

employeeNumber.description: A unique numerical identifier with a maximum of 9 digits.

self.description: A unique link reference to the employee item.

exchangeRate.description: The exchange rate between the base currency and the invoice currency.

entryType.description: Type of the journal entry. This is automatically set to supplierInvoice.

voucher.description: Voucher that the entry belongs to.

voucherNumber.description: Journal voucher number that must be at least 1.

self.description: A unique link reference to the voucher item.

contraVatAmount.description: The amount of VAT on the entry on the contra account.

contraVatAmountInBaseCurrency.description: The amount of VAT on the entry on the contra account in base currency.

remainderInDefaultCurrency.description: Remaining amount to be paid in default currency.

supplier.description: The supplier is the vendor from whom you buy your goods. Either 'supplier' or 'contraAccount' is required.

supplierNumber.description: The supplier number is a positive unique numerical identifier with a maximum of 9 digits.

self.description: A unique self reference of the supplier.

supplierInvoiceNumber.description: The unique identifier of the supplier invoice gotten from the supplier.

paymentDetails.description: Payment details associated with the supplier invoice. Each payment detail contains two keys that are required. For the +71 type, fiSupplierNo and ocrLine is expected. For the +73 type, fiSupplierNo and message is expected. For the +04 type, giroAccount and ocrLine is expected. For the bank transfer type, accountNo and message is expected. For the IBAN type, ibanSwift and message is expected. For the +75 type, fiSupplierNo and ocrLineMessage is expected. Please refer to the schema for validation rules details.

paymentType.description: A specific payment type on the entry.

paymentTypeNumber.description: The payment type number is a positive unique numerical identifier.

self.description: A unique link reference to the payment type item.

dueDate.description: The date the entry is due for payment. Format according to ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD).

project.description: The project the entry is connected to.

projectNumber.description: A unique identifier of the project.

self.description: A unique reference to the project resource.

unit1.description: The first unit of measure applied to the entry. Requires dimension module.

unitNumber.description: The unique identifier of the unit.

self.description: A unique reference to the unit resource.

unit2.description: The second unit of measure applied to the entry. Requires dimension module.

unitNumber.description: The unique identifier of the unit.

self.description: A unique reference to the unit resource.

journalNumber.description: Journal number that must be at least 1.

self.description: A unique reference to the journal resource.

contraAccount.description: The account used for the funds. Either 'supplier' or 'contraAccount' is required.

self.description: A unique reference to the account resource.

self.description: A unique link reference to the contraVatAccount item.
